description: LOOM worktree lifecycle hooks for Claude Code

_notes.installation: Merge the 'hooks' block below into .claude/settings.json. Replace ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} with the absolute path to this repo's root.

event_mapping.WorktreeCreate: Fires before git worktree creation. Blockable: exit 2 aborts creation.
event_mapping.WorktreeRemove: Fires after git worktree removal. Non-blockable.
event_mapping.SubagentStart: Fires when a subagent is spawned. Non-blockable.
event_mapping.SubagentStop: Fires when a subagent stops. Non-blockable.

_notes.graceful_noop: All scripts exit 0 immediately for non-loom/* branches.
